concept: Be like water — flow, adapt, and overcome.

style_selection.rationale: Fractal gold visuals reinforce the fluid, cosmic quality of the water metaphor.

visual_prompt.primary_prompt: A surreal looping reel — liquid gold water fractal geometry, sacred architecture dissolving into flowing rivers of light, slow orbital camera drift, hyper-detailed 4K cinematic motion, no text overlays, spiritual transcendent aesthetic.
visual_prompt.negative_prompt: text, watermarks, logos, low quality, blurry, static, harsh cuts

script.full_text: Empty your mind. Be formless, shapeless — like water. Water does not resist. It flows around obstacles, over them, through them. If you put water into a cup, it becomes the cup. If you put water into a bottle, it becomes the bottle. Be water, my friend. Adapt. Flow. Rise.

segments.visual_prompt: Black void dissolving into a single drop of liquid gold falling in slow motion, fractal ripple expanding outward.
Liquid gold morphing between shapes — sphere to river to mist — sacred geometry dissolving and reforming.

segments.text: Water does not resist. It flows around obstacles, over them, through them.
segments.visual_prompt: Cinematic slow-motion river splitting around a dark monolith rock, gold light refracting through water surface.

segments.text: If you put water into a cup, it becomes the cup. If you put water into a bottle, it becomes the bottle.
segments.visual_prompt: Abstract visualization of liquid gold pouring and perfectly filling geometric shapes — cube, sphere, spiral — each glowing from within.

segments.text: Be water, my friend. Adapt. Flow. Rise.
segments.purpose: climax and call to action — leave them with the feeling
segments.visual_prompt: A river of liquid gold cresting over a mountain, catching dawn light, vast and unstoppable, camera pulling back to reveal cosmic scale.

elevenLabs_config.delivery_notes: Calm, measured authority. Each sentence lands with weight. Slight pause between major lines. Not urgent — inevitable.

caption.full_caption:
Be like water. 💧

Flow around the obstacles. Adapt to whatever container life gives you. And when the pressure builds — rise.

Bruce Lee didn't just teach martial arts. He taught the philosophy of motion.

Save this for the days you feel stuck. 🔖

#motivation #mindset #brucelee #belikewater #resilience #flow #adaptation #wisdom #viral #reels #inspiration #growth #philosophy #lifeadvice #success

next_reel_suggestions.concept: Iron sharpens iron — you become who you surround yourself with.
next_reel_suggestions.quote: Iron sharpens iron, and one man sharpens another.

next_reel_suggestions.concept: Fall seven times, rise eight — the Japanese art of resilience.
next_reel_suggestions.quote: Fall seven times, stand up eight.

next_reel_suggestions.concept: Stop waiting to feel motivated. Discipline is the bridge.
next_reel_suggestions.quote: Discipline is doing what needs to be done, even when you don't want to do it.
